summary:
The Frankfort horizontal plane is an anatomical reference line drawn from the porion (superior border of the external auditory meatus) to the orbitale (lowest point of the orbital rim). This definition is universally recognized in clinical practice and supports option D as the correct choice.  

\boxed{D}

This definition is universally recognized in clinical practice and supports option D as the correct choice.  

\boxed{D}. Answer choice: D
